sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state - player should be very close to target now
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] in ('c', 'b'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# Check if level completed
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done')}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
